rule_text: 每位用户每日可参与1次，奖品以实际发放为准。

rolling_card_strip.resting_state: horizontal strip of 5 cards with center card featured slightly larger
rolling_card_strip.scrolling: drag/swipe horizontally to rotate cards; momentum and inertia
rolling_card_strip.snap: snap to center the nearest card on release
rolling_card_strip.win_presentation: flash/glow effect on the centered card when result is determined
rolling_card_strip.timing: smooth scrolling, deceleration consistent with finger velocity
